title: 18w43a Sand & Sandstone
description: Brings back sand and sandstone textures from 1.14 snapshot 18w43a, with connected textures.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

**18w43a Sand & Sandstone** brings back sand and sandstone textures from 1.14 snapshot, 18w43a.

![optional](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a868b69f3fcafea77190464ed6cba5ded63d8581_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Alternative Textures</summary>

![Alternative textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eeff5ce45c3a4b137153c58bfb57a76dabd4a26_0.webp)

In this snapshot, [only sand and sandstone types](https://www.reddit.com/media?url=https%3A%2F%2Fpreview.redd.it%2F5lp0d5bnqhu11.png%3Fwidth%3D1080%26crop%3Dsmart%26auto%3Dwebp%26s%3Da174a02b2d0ef9866a0d5d8768bcc52d2b7ed940) received new textures, while red sandstone variants at the time were still using textures from an earlier [texture update test release](https://web.archive.org/web/20180131000932/https://minecraft.net/en-us/article/try-new-minecraft-java-textures). For consistency, alternative red sand and sandstone textures have been included in the _textures_ folder to fix this.

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51c250f466303127a6bb6c9f11e658b0ddf6d709.gif)
To add them in, drop the selected textures into the _block_ folder to replace the current textures.


</details>


<details>
<summary>Connected Textures</summary>
  
![Connected](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2afe68f1ce1f098d79f7dba08bd2e24fed1a45c7_0.webp)
  
Sandstone is the only block that uses connected textures by default. To make the alternative red sandstone texture connect, move the _red_sandstone_ folder from the _optifine_ folder into the _ctm_ folder.

</details>
